message:
fix(fp-conformance): excel round-trip writes with index=false to match default reader (br-frankenpandas-989b)

execute_excel_round_trip_fixture_operation wrote the frame with the
public write_excel_bytes default (index=true, matching pandas
to_excel) but read it back with ExcelReadOptions::default() (no
index_col), so the original index was leaked back in as a leading
data column. dataframes_semantically_equal then saw mismatched
column_names and the round-trip returned false.

Switches the round-trip helper to write_excel_bytes_with_options
with ExcelWriteOptions { index: false, .. } so the writer emits
exactly the columns the default reader will recover. Public
write_excel_bytes default is unchanged (still pandas-aligned
index=true). Adds ExcelWriteOptions / write_excel_bytes_with_options
to the fp_io use list.

fp-conformance: packet_filter_runs_io_round_trip_packet now passes
all 10 cases (excel_round_trip_basic_strict was the only failure).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
